raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tee mannas
Teesas atmette/ un mannôs Lik-
kumôs ne staigaja/ un mannas
Swehdeenas ſagahnija; Jo wiſ-
nu Sîrds dsinnahs winnu Suh-
du-Deeweim pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr manna Azz fan-
dseja tohs/ ka es tohs ne nomai-
taja/ un ar teem Gallu ne dar-
riju Tuksneſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet es ſazziju us winnu
Behrneem Tuksneſi: Ne stat-
gajt juhsu Tehwu Likkumês/ un
ne ſargajt winnu Teesas/ un ne
apgabnijectees ar winnu Suh-
du-Deeweem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu tas KUNGS
juhsu Deews/ ſtaigajt mannôs
Likcumôs / un ſargajt mannas
Teesas/ un darrajt tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ſwentijeet mannas
Swehdeenas/ un tee buhs par
weenu Sihti ſtarp man un ſtarp juws/ ka juhs ſajubtat/ ka
es eſmu tas KUNGS juhsu
Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet ir tee Behrni bija
prett man pahrgalwigi/ tee ne
ſtaigaja mannôs Likcumôs/ un
ne ſargaja mannas Teesas/ ka
tee tahs buhtu darriſchi/ kurras
kad kahds Zilweks darra / tad
wiſch zaar tahm dsihwohs/ tee
ſagahnija mannas Swehdeenas.
Ta ka es ſazziju: Es gribbu man-
nu Bahrsibu pahr teein iſgahſt/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tomehr ee negreesu ſawu
Rohku/ un darriju to manna
Wahrda deht/ ka tas ne taptu
ſagahnihts preeſch to Pagann
Azzim/ preeſch kuru Azzim es
tohs biju iſweddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir es pazehlu ſawu Roh-
kn pahr teem Tuksneſi / ka es
tohs iſkaifitu ſtarp teem Paga-
neein/ un tohs iſputtinatu Wal-
ſis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tee mannas
Teesas ne bij darrijuſchi/ bet
mannus Likkumus atnettujſchi/
un mannas Swehdeenas ſagah-
nijujſchi/ un winnu Azzis winnu
Tehwu Suhdu-Deeweem pak-
katdsinnahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz dewu es teem ar-
ridsan Likkumus/ kaſtabbi ne bi-
ja/ un Teesas/ zaar ko tre ne
warreja dsihwoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es ſagahniju tohs ar
winnu Dahwanahm/zaur to/ ka
tee wiſſu / kaſ to Mahti at-
plehſch/ likke zaar Unguni eet/
tadeht ka es tohs nopehiitu/ ka
tee ſajustu/ ka es tas KUNGS
eſmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht tu Zilweka
Behrns/ runna us to Israëta
Namnu/ im faſſi us teem: Ta
fakka tas Klungs KUNGS:
Juhsu Tehwi irr manni wehl ar
to ſaimojſchi/ un ar Pabrkahp-
ſchann prett manni pabrkahpu-
ſchı.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad es tohs biju us to
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
